title: Working in the Park
body:
Hey Hayes! I am loving the park office setup.

After security removed the rail system from the industrial park, the commute from District 06 for lunch breaks was just too much. I do wish they would bring the tram back but for now the park office is great.

I’ve made some progress on the tech you requested. The portable Elevator was a great (albeit hacky) idea, but I think some of these tools are really going to come in handy for developing void city infrastructure.

We hope to have updates on exhibits as improvements are completed in MythOS City Development.

- GS
‎
